name: n8n
cost_notice: Alibaba Cloud defaults to cn-hongkong and supports the listed non-mainland regions.
Alibaba Cloud mainland China regions are not supported.
Custom domains: AWS uses --domain + --hosted-zone-id (Route53); Aliyun uses --domain + --dns-domain (Alidns). DNS propagation and ACME may take several minutes.
First bootstrap may take 8-15 minutes on Aliyun public OS images.
Cloud resource charges and applicable AWS Marketplace software fees are billed separately.
